title: paeonia lusitanica proles ovatifolia
intro: Paeonia lusitanica proles ovatifolia, also known as the common peony, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and western China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its phenolic compounds and flavonoids. The health benefits of Paeonia lusitanica proles ovatifolia include reducing pain and inflammation, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as extracts and tinctures, are used in modern medicine to treat various conditions, including arthritis, insomnia, and digestive issues.
